Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
#MODIFIER# PROCEDURE #NAME# ( @FormIdent NVARCHAR(255) ,@TableID INT ,@HistoryTypeID NVARCHAR(255) ,@UserID INT ,@State INT ,@Data NVARCHAR(MAX) ,@SubTableID INT ) AS BEGIN
INSERT INTO dbo.History ( [FormIdent] ,[TableID] ,[CreateDate] ,[HistoryTypeID] ,[AccountID] ,[State] ,[Data] ,[SubTableID] ) SELECT [FormIdent] = @FormIdent ,[TableID] = @TableID ,[CreateDate] = GETDATE() ,[HistoryTypeID] = @HistoryTypeID ,[AccountID] = @UserID ,[State] = @State ,[Data] = @Data ,[SubTableID] = @SubTableID
RETURN SCOPE_IDENTITY();
END
